problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: Combining Reservoir computing with physical substrate with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
